## Component(s)

<!-- contracts / oracle-node / fingerprinting / indexer / sdk / extension / specs / docs -->

## Checklist

- [ ] **DCO:** every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`). See [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing locally (`forge test` / `pnpm test` / `pytest` as applicable).
- [ ] Lint/format clean (Slither/semgrep for contracts; eslint/ruff as applicable).
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed.
- [ ] **If this touches the on-chain schema:** the Borsh⇄EAS round-trip equivalence test is updated and the deployed-schema drift check passes.
- [ ] **If this touches security-relevant code:** the [threat-model](../docs/THREAT_MODEL.md) coverage matrix row(s) and their tests/runbooks are updated.
- [ ] **If this is a protocol/economic change:** a JIP is linked and (for Economic JIPs) the on-chain-vote requirement is noted.
